name: Iron and Mangowood Wire Fruit Basket Black - Threshold™: Round Fruit Holder, Traditional Style, Mango Wood & Iron
description: Display your favorite fruits in style with the Iron and Wooden Wire Fruit Basket from Threshold™. Made from metal with a wide open-top design, this fruit basket lets you store an ample amount of fruits or vegetables. Featuring a mesh design, this metal fruit basket allows for air to naturally ripen and keep fruits fresh. In a black finish with a wooden base, it features a classic wired design that easily coordinates with a variety of decor styles.
